name: Soda Bread (Callery)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Make a well in the center and add buttermilk.
4. Stir just enough to moisten the dough.
5. Turn the dough onto a floured surface and gently work with your hands for about one minute.
6. Shape the dough into a round loaf and place it in an 8-inch round cake pan.
7. Cut an "X" across the top of the dough with a knife.
8. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 55 to 60 minutes.
9. The bread is done when it sounds hollow when you rap on the bottom.
